## Summary

Describe the user-facing behavior, packaging, documentation, or repository hygiene change.

## Validation

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make release-preflight`
- [ ] Manual install tested from the generated DMG/pkg

## Manual Input Coverage

- [ ] TextEdit
- [ ] Safari
- [ ] Notes
- [ ] Terminal
- [ ] System Settings input-source add/select flow

## Risk Notes

- Candidate ordering impact: describe any Sucheng, New Sucheng, Cangjie, or Pinyin ranking effect.
- Learning/privacy impact: describe any local learning, persistence, logging, or sensitive-data handling effect.
- Packaging/signing impact: describe any bundle, pkg, DMG, signing, or notarization effect.
